_readme: Classification DB for the media library. category: final|test|pending|hidden. bestOf: shows on public /gallery. platforms: where/when published. Pages regenerate at deploy via scripts/vercel-postbuild.mjs. Pending items show Approve/Reject buttons that open prefilled GitHub issues.

2026-07-09-nyack-live-tracking-final-916.title: Order Another Coffee
2026-07-09-nyack-live-tracking-final-916.caption: "Bear Mountain run. Two of 'em are still crossing the Tappan Zee — I can watch 'em crawl. Order another coffee."

2026-07-09-diner-oldtimer-v2-final-916.m.title: Forty Years, One Download
2026-07-09-diner-oldtimer-v2-final-916.m.caption: "This app already knew Storm King... even knew this diner. Took me four decades. Took the kid one download."

2026-07-08-diner-oldtimer-final-916.mp4.title: Forty Years, One Download — v1, REJECTED
2026-07-08-diner-oldtimer-final-916.mp4.caption: Rejected by Ivan 2026-07-08: bike morphs between camera pans. Replaced by v2 (locked shot).

2026-07-06-gas-station-skeptic-final-916.title: The Gas Station Skeptic
2026-07-06-gas-station-skeptic-final-916.caption: "He literally TALKED to his route app. Two more hours of twisties, end at a diner. And it just... did it."

2026-07-07-hawks-nest-dad-final-916.mp4.title: Hawk's Nest, Find Barbecue on the Way
2026-07-07-hawks-nest-dad-final-916.mp4.caption: "Route. Ribs. Done. My kids think I'm cool again."

twotired-vs-calimoto-manhattan.png.title: Same Ride, Two Apps
twotired-vs-calimoto-manhattan.png.caption: Brooklyn to Hawk's Nest: Calimoto goes straight through Midtown. TwoTired takes the Hudson out — like any NYC rider would.
